title: Malai Pilaf with Dutch-Style Vegetables
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish from the Indian subcontinent, featuring malai spices and dutch-style vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and sauté until they start to caramelize.
Add the malai spice mix and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the carrots and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add the green beans and sauté for 3 minutes.
Add the basmati rice and water to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and season with salt to taste.
